reason: Verified that agent QA-20260427-051320-45rz is running, accepts messages, and responds correctly to a math question with the expected answer "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing "Your Agents" with 3 agents listed in sidebar
Found "QA-20260427-051320-45rz" agent in sidebar — Agent was visible with status indicator showing "idle"
Clicked agent "QA-20260427-051320-45rz" in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded showing agent name, status "idle", and message input field
Verified agent status — Status displayed as "idle" which meets requirement (running or idle acceptable)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in message input field — Message successfully entered in input field
Clicked send button — Message sent successfully, new session "Basic Math Question Session" created, agent status changed to "working"
Waited for response with timeout of 10 seconds — Activity indicator "Working..." appeared then disappeared after ~5 seconds
Verified response content — Response clearly displays "4", which correctly answers the question "What is 2+2?", with working duration shown as "Worked for 5s"
Confirmed agent status returned to idle — Agent status in sidebar shows "idle" after completing the response
